generated_oml:
instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring rotational speed of car wheels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ChassisAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring acceleration forces on the car chassis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChassisAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance BodyVibrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vibrations in the car body structure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BodyVibrationDataTransmitted
]

instance WheelSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance ChassisAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChassisAccelerationSensor
]

instance BodyVibrationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BodyVibrationSensor
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wheel speed data collected from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance ChassisAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time acceleration data from car chassis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChassisAccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler
]

instance BodyVibrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vibration data from car body structure"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BodyVibrationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for simulating car behavior using analytical models"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveService
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric model representing spatial dimensions of car components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, OptimizerEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations model for dynamic behavior of the car under external forces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance CyberPhysicalKnowledge : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Knowledge base integrating cyber-physical system aspects for accurate representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimatorEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm updating model parameters using sensor data for accurate system representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm processing sensor data and models to detect faults in the car system"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm estimating current state of the car system using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictiveService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm optimizing system efficiency through parameter adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller algorithm for real-time system control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring of car safety and performance via sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight, PerformanceDeviationInsight
]

instance PredictiveService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating car behavior under current conditions to predict future states"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedBehaviorInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for enhancing system efficiency through algorithmic optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for supervisory control of car systems using real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CorrectiveAction
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating potential fault in car components based on sensor data analysis"
]

instance PerformanceDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight detecting deviations from safe or optimal operational parameters"
]

instance PredictedBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from simulations predicting future car behavior"
]

instance EfficiencyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing recommendations to improve system efficiency"
]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated action initiated to correct system violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Wheels : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Main component of the car system responsible for movement and support"
]

instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the car supporting wheels and body"
]

instance BodyStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Outer shell of the car providing aerodynamic and safety features"
]

instance CarEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Wheels, Chassis, BodyStructure
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates calibration algorithms to update Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environmental models with parameter estimates, using the resulting data to inform monitors that assess safety and optimization. Detected violations trigger human or algorithmic decisions to modify the Physical Twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through calibration algorithms that update parameters using sensor data. Validation is performed via monitors that assess safety and operational optimality, with violation detection triggering corrective actions by humans or algorithms."
]
